message: The engine's Codex renders must stay true to their canonical Claude sources: every Codex review persona keeps its read-only sandbox and pins no model, and every rendered persona and command matches byte-for-byte what the render tool produces from its .claude/ source (a hand-edited, stale, or source-less render goes red). To fix: edit the canonical .claude/ source and regenerate (uv run --directory .engine --frozen -- python tools/codex_gen.py generate); never edit a render by hand.
